title: Barbosella cogniauxiana
taxonomy: Barbosella cogniauxiana is classified in the following manner: it belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Barbosella cogniauxiana is placed in the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Barbosella is a small group of epiphytic orchids, and within this genus, B. cogniauxiana is a species that is endemic to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of B. cogniauxiana is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its small size and distinctive flowers. Overall, the classification of Barbosella cogniauxiana provides valuable insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
